overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves along covered sidewalks, crosses a major intersection with yellow crosswalks, and continues past illuminated billboards and storefronts in a dense cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure, passing pedestrians and concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: person in bright blue pants walking in the opposite direction along the barrier

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with red graffiti running along the left side of the walkway
large pink neon billboard displaying 'VISION MORE' text on the right building facade
massive concrete highway structure overhead creating a covered corridor effect
large digital screen ahead displaying 'REAL HATER' text with a portrait

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. A concrete noise barrier with graffiti runs along the left, while neon billboards including 'VISION MORE' illuminate the right. The path leads toward a distant 'REAL HATER' billboard as sparse pedestrians walk by.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: exits the covered highway underpass into the open intersection area with tall buildings visible
pedestrian signal changes to walk, ego begins crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting at the crosswalk, then crossing the multi-lane street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: green sports car waiting at the traffic light near the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and 'WAIT' text painted on the asphalt
massive vertical digital billboard displaying a woman and 'SPECIAL EDITION' text for Chromanticore
tall building with illuminated windows rising on the left side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide cyberpunk intersection dominated by towering buildings and massive digital billboards. The camera approaches and crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk, passing a waiting green sports car. The Chromanticore liquor advertisement towers on the right while pedestrians cross with the traffic signal.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts and industrial ventilation

events.description: enters the neon-lit commercial district with prominent pink signage and industrial building features

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past brightly lit storefronts, moving away from the intersection into a more enclosed street canyon

entered.detail: storefronts with bright pink and red neon lighting including 'LICK ME' signage
massive circular industrial fans mounted on the building facade
neon sign for 'BURRITO' shop with arrow pointing downward

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the walk continues along a narrower sidewalk lined with vibrant pink neon storefronts. Large industrial ventilation fans dominate the right-side building facade, while the enclosed street canyon creates an intimate neon-lit atmosphere distinct from the open intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban underpass into a sprawling neon intersection and finally into a dense, glowing street canyon. It begins with a walk along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing graffiti-covered concrete barriers and neon billboards like Vision More. As the path opens up, the camera emerges into a wide intersection dominated by towering digital advertisements and a green sports car, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath a massive Chromanticore liquor sign. The scene then shifts from the open plaza back into a narrower corridor lined with vibrant pink storefronts and large industrial ventilation fans. This transition creates an intimate, enclosed atmosphere as the camera moves deeper into the neon-lit urban environment.
